Put character production stills here.

Default paths used by the result page:

- `hamilton.jpg`
- `elphaba.jpg`
- `glinda.jpg`
- `valjean.jpg`
- `javert.jpg`
- `phantom.jpg`
- `angelica.jpg`
- `orpheus.jpg`
- `eurydice.jpg`
- `roxie.jpg`
- `velma.jpg`
- `sweeney.jpg`
- `lovett.jpg`
- `plant.jpg`
- `curtain.jpg`

If you prefer another extension or file name, set `stillPath` in `src/data/personas.ts`.
